seoTitle: Gurrundah vs Guyra — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Gurrundah and Guyra. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Gurrundah and Guyra.
heading: Gurrundah vs Guyra — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Gurrundah, New South Wales and Guyra, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Gurrundah has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Guyra (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Gurrundah or Guyra safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Gurrundah has a flood risk score of 25/100, while Guyra scores 58/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Gurrundah scores 40/100 for bushfire risk. Guyra scores 29/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Gurrundah or Guyra?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Gurrundah has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.93% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
